metadata.title: Living in Danger (Buddha Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:28.05] Live for yourself, it's a wonderful thing
[00:30.24] You can do what you want, you can live in a dream
[00:32.71] Get up, get down
[00:37.25] You're living your life in peace and in harmony
[00:41.00] You making your own decisions
[00:44.58] That's how it's got to be for you and me
[00:47.46] So many people are running 'round and 'round
[00:50.58] Without any sense of logic
[00:52.94] I see lies
[00:54.88] In the eyes of a stranger, whoa (live for yourself, it's a wonderful thing)
[00:59.32] You'll be living in danger (you can do what you want, you can live in a dream)
[01:02.15] I see lies
[01:03.96] In the eyes of a stranger, whoa (live for yourself, it's a wonderful thing)
[01:07.31] You'll be living in danger (you can do what you want, you can live in a dream)
[01:11.65] I see lies
[01:13.25] In the eyes of a stranger, whoa
[01:18.33] You'll be living in danger (huh)
[01:24.58] People are the same today as they used to be
[01:28.34] The same expectations
[01:31.29] So high, no one can reach that high
[01:33.82] Not I nor you get satisfied today
[01:37.64] We never get enough
[01:40.08] I see lies
[01:41.65] In the eyes of a stranger, whoa (live for yourself, it's a wonderful thing)
[01:46.13] You'll be living in danger (you can do what you want, you can live in a dream)

[02:00.67] In the eyes of a stranger, whoa (live for yourself, it's a wonderful thing)

[02:08.21] I see lies
[02:09.92] In the eyes of a stranger, whoa
[02:14.95] You'll be living in danger
[02:19.87] 
[02:34.36] Oh, people are the same today as they used to be

[02:57.43] You'll be living in danger (you can do what you want, you can live in a dream)

[03:01.78] In the eyes of a stranger

[03:07.69] Oh, so much danger, oh so much danger (I see lies, in the eyes of a stranger)
